phase1.stop_reason: beam-search degeneration: empty predictions on all samples by epoch 4

interpretation: Phase 2 fine-tune produced the largest absolute lift of any architecture (+39.27 pp), bringing TrOCR-base from 47.51% to 8.24% CER on the freeform-trace test split. Notably this is also better than its own Phase 1 best CER on synthetic data (44.25%), suggesting the small-dataset Phase 2 fine-tune stabilised the beam-search degeneration that destabilised Phase 1 training. Post-P2 CER ordering across all architectures (TrOCR-small 1.34 < TrOCR-base 8.24 < PARSeq 29.17 < CNN+RNN 67.24) still tracks Stage 1 capability ordering.
